overall.description: Gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character standing on a high-rise building rooftop overlooking Gotham City during a stormy night. The player controls a drone moving along a cable line toward a distant objective while a sweeping searchlight illuminates the dark cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise building rooftop overlooking gothic cityscape

events.description: bright searchlight beam sweeps across the scene from the left side
drone begins moving left along the cable line away from the building

agents.ego_description: Batman stands stationary on the rooftop, facing the city while controlling the drone's departure

notable_agents.action: Batman stands with cape flowing, operating the remote drone device
drone with blue indicator lights hovering near the building before traveling left

entered.detail: tall dark building with ornate architecture and scaffolding
illuminated green circular signage mounted on the building facade
orange-red metal railing along the rooftop edge
dark turbulent clouds covering the night sky
distant illuminated buildings across the cityscape

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on a high rooftop overlooking the stormy Gotham City skyline. A drone hovers near a gothic skyscraper with a green neon sign before beginning its journey left along a cable. A bright searchlight beam sweeps across the dark clouds from the left, illuminating the scene intermittently.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop with extended city view including distant bridge

events.description: distant bridge structure becomes visible on the left side of the frame
drone continues moving left, now positioned over the open city space

agents.ego_description: Batman remains stationary, monitoring the drone's progress as it travels further along the cable

notable_agents.action: drone with blue lights traveling left along the cable toward the distant objective

entered.detail: large bridge structure spanning across the left side of the cityscape
bright white searchlight beam cutting through the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its journey left along the cable, moving away from the gothic skyscraper toward a distant bridge visible on the left. The searchlight beam has swept to the center of the frame, and the green neon sign is no longer visible as the view shifts. Batman remains on the rooftop, observing the drone's flight over the expansive cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a close-up of a gothic skyscraper and expands into a wide view of the stormy Gotham City skyline. It begins with Batman standing on a high rooftop as a drone hovers near a building marked by a green neon sign before gliding left along a cable. As the drone moves away from the skyscraper, a bright searchlight beam sweeps across the dark clouds, shifting from the left toward the center of the frame. The scene then opens up to reveal an expansive cityscape, leaving the neon sign behind as the camera tracks the drone's flight toward a distant bridge. Finally, the perspective widens to show Batman observing the drone's journey across the rain-swept urban horizon.
